ml_top_positive_drivers.interpretation: Clean promoter background — low character risk
Large listed company — asset base inferred
Strong sector conditions — favourable for lending

decision_rationale: Infosys Limited demonstrates exceptional creditworthiness, meriting an 'AA' rating. The company exhibits robust capacity (score 95) with an outstanding Interest Coverage Ratio of 85.88x and an EBITDA of ₹4208.1 crores, alongside strong character (score 90) and favorable operating conditions (score 90) in a leading IT services sector. Capitalization is excellent (score 85), implied by very low leverage and a healthy current ratio of 2.27x, while collateral (score 80) is substantial given its ₹17419 crores asset base. The blended risk score of 88.33/100 strongly supports the approval of the requested loan amount.
